absorption: ASK absorption at vPOC. A high positive delta of +93 failed to move the price higher, indicating sellers are absorbing the buying pressure.
dom_observation: Stacked asks visible above 61290, acting as resistance. Large bid cluster below 61220, acting as support.
reasoning: Fiyat, yuksek pozitif deltaya (+93) ragmen vPOC seviyesini gecemedi, bu da saticilarin alimlari absorbe ettigini gosteren guclu bir ASK absorption sinyalidir.
